hero.subtitle: Your trusted source for authentic Indonesian food products in Taiwan. From beloved snacks to essential cooking ingredients, we bring the taste of home to you.

about.title: Mahkota Taiwan
about.description: Mahkota Taiwan is Taiwan's leading Indonesian food distributor, proudly bridging Indonesian culture and Taiwanese daily life since 2021. With over 26 carefully curated product lines — spanning instant food, snacks, cooking spices, beverages, and household essentials — we serve more than 1 million customers through 300+ partner stores across the island. All our products are Halal certified, ensuring the highest standards of quality and trust. Backed by a reliable supply chain and comprehensive logistics network, Mahkota Taiwan is more than just a distributor — we are a cultural ambassador, bringing the authentic taste of home to every Indonesian community in Taiwan.
about.mission: Our mission is to bridge cultures through food, providing high-quality Indonesian products with reliable distribution across Taiwan.
about.label: Who We Are
about.highlight1: Halal certified products ensuring quality and trust
